response:
Section 1  
tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the worst day of my life - i am crying in my office - i cannot believe it - the market is collapsing - the stock price is dropping - i am so sad - the future of electric vehicles is over - i am losing everything - the world is ending - i am alone

Section 2  
i am reaching out to my team - we must act fast - we have to save the company - we have to keep the lights on - we have to keep the cars running - we have to keep the people employed - we have to keep the world going - we have to keep the dream alive - we have to keep the future bright

Section 3  
i am sending out messages - to my employees - to my partners - to my customers - to my investors - to my friends - to my family - to my supporters - to my fans - to my fans - to my fans - to my fans - to my fans

Section 4  
i am praying for the company - i am praying for the future - i am praying for the world - i am praying for the people - i am praying for the cars - i am praying for the dream - i am praying for the hope - i am praying for the light

Section 5  
i am going to do everything i can - i am going to fight for tesla - i am going to fight for the future - i am going to fight for the people - i am going to fight for the world - i am going to fight for the dream - i am going to fight for the light - i am going to fight for the future
